generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about protecting them. Look at how other countries balance security and civil liberties; we can learn from their examples. It's our responsibility to ensure our nation is prepared. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
